case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. R. KHAMPHAKDY A/K/A RATHJADA KHAMPHAKDY et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-08-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT R. KHAMPHAKDY A/K/A RATHJADA KHAMPHAKDY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012
DECLARATION CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT R. KHAMPHAKDY A/K/A RATHJADA KHAMPHAKDY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT R. KHAMPHAKDY A/K/A RATHJADA KHAMPHAKDY
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INETERST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
DECLARATION REDUCTION IN FILING FEES PER (B/P) CODE SECTION 6322.1 (C) (1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT R. KHAMPHAKDY A/K/A RATHJADA KHAMPHAKDY $4,494.95 PRINCIPAL, $300.12 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,044.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-08-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
